category_sources: Official GitHub README describes fcp as a faster cp(1) alternative for common copy use cases.
source_facts.description says fcp is a significantly faster alternative to Unix cp(1).
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use `fcp`.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes installation, usage, and benchmarks.
